Interacting_Proteins.reason: Section 2.2 explicitly discusses a regulatory AHAS small subunit (SSU) associated with the catalytic subunit.

Breeding_or_Engineering_Application_Valu.reason: The review explicitly states a single target-site mutation can confer tolerance and that these traits were deployed by conventional breeding; stacking is also discussed.
